2026-06-25.title: Pretty good but costly.

You have to remind the characters pretty consistently of events unless you absolutely only choose premade answers and don’t change any big plots. But if you’re on a budget and stick to the smallest subscription it’s decent for an occasional story progression. Too costly for constant gameplay unfortunately as the monthly gems provided for the lowest subscription flies by pretty quickly.
